if.test: queryMode != null and queryMode == 'related' and siteId != null

select.if:
WITH RECURSIVE category_tree AS ( SELECT id FROM gb_categories WHERE del_flag = '0' AND POSITION(CAST(id AS CHAR) IN #{categoryIdsFilter}) > 0 > 0 UNION ALL SELECT c.id FROM gb_categories c INNER JOIN category_tree ct ON c.parent_id = ct.id WHERE c.del_flag = '0' )
SELECT g.*, coalesce(box_cnt.cnt, 0) as box_count, box_cnt.box_ids as box_ids, coalesce(site_cnt.incl_cnt, 0) as related_sites_count, coalesce(site_cnt.excl_cnt, 0) as excluded_sites_count, c.name as category_name, c.icon as category_icon FROM gb_games g LEFT JOIN gb_game_category_relations gcr ON g.id = gcr.game_id AND gcr.is_primary = '1' LEFT JOIN gb_categories c ON gcr.category_id = c.id AND c.del_flag = '0' -- 预聚合：盒子数量（统计当前站点可见的盒子：自有+默认未排除+跨站共享已关联） LEFT JOIN ( SELECT bgr.game_id, COUNT(*) as cnt, GROUP_CONCAT(bgr.box_id ORDER BY bgr.sort_order ASC SEPARATOR ',') as box_ids FROM gb_box_game_relations bgr INNER JOIN gb_game_boxes b ON bgr.box_id = b.id AND b.del_flag = '0' LEFT JOIN gb_site_box_relations box_incl ON b.id = box_incl.box_id AND box_incl.site_id = COALESCE(NULLIF(#{siteId}, 0), #{params.personalSiteId}) AND box_incl.relation_type = 'include' LEFT JOIN gb_site_box_relations box_excl ON b.id = box_excl.box_id AND box_excl.site_id = COALESCE(NULLIF(#{siteId}, 0), #{params.personalSiteId}) AND box_excl.relation_type = 'exclude' WHERE ( b.site_id = COALESCE(NULLIF(#{siteId}, 0), #{params.personalSiteId}) OR (b.site_id = #{params.personalSiteId} AND NOT (box_incl.id IS NULL AND box_excl.id IS NOT NULL)) OR (b.site_id != COALESCE(NULLIF(#{siteId}, 0), #{params.personalSiteId}) AND b.site_id != #{params.personalSiteId} AND box_incl.id IS NOT NULL) ) GROUP BY bgr.game_id ) box_cnt ON g.id = box_cnt.game_id -- 预聚合：关联/排除站点数量（避免N+1关联子查询） LEFT JOIN ( SELECT game_id, SUM(CASE WHEN relation_type = 'include' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as incl_cnt, SUM(CASE WHEN relation_type = 'exclude' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as excl_cnt FROM gb_site_game_relations GROUP BY game_id ) site_cnt ON g.id = site_cnt.game_id
g.del_flag = '0'
AND (g.site_id = #{siteId} OR g.site_id = #{params.personalSiteId})
AND g.site_id = #{siteId}
AND g.site_id = #{params.personalSiteId}
AND 1 = 0
AND g.name LIKE concat('%', #{name}, '%') AND g.subtitle LIKE concat('%', #{subtitle}, '%')
AND EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM gb_game_category_relations gcr WHERE gcr.game_id = g.id AND gcr.category_id IN (SELECT id FROM category_tree) )
AND NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM gb_game_category_relations gcr_unc WHERE gcr_unc.game_id = g.id )
AND (g.game_type IS NULL OR g.game_type = '')
AND g.game_type = #{gameType}
AND g.device_support = #{deviceSupport} AND g.is_new = #{isNew} AND g.is_hot = #{isHot} AND g.is_recommend = #{isRecommend} AND g.status = #{status}
AND EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM gb_box_game_relations bgr WHERE bgr.game_id = g.id AND POSITION(CAST(bgr.box_id AS CHAR) IN #{boxIdsFilter}) > 0 > 0 )
AND g.update_time >= FROM_UNIXTIME(#{updateTimeStart}/1000)
AND g.update_time <= DATE_ADD(FROM_UNIXTIME(#{updateTimeEnd}/1000), INTERVAL 1 DAY)
ORDER BY coalesce(box_cnt.cnt, 0) DESC, g.sort_order ASC, g.create_time DESC

if.test: queryMode != null and queryMode == 'related' and siteId != null

select.if:
WITH RECURSIVE category_tree AS ( SELECT id FROM gb_categories WHERE del_flag = '0' AND POSITION(CAST(id AS CHAR) IN #{categoryIdsFilter}) > 0 > 0 UNION ALL SELECT c.id FROM gb_categories c INNER JOIN category_tree ct ON c.parent_id = ct.id WHERE c.del_flag = '0' )
SELECT g.id FROM gb_games g
g.del_flag = '0'
AND (g.site_id = #{siteId} OR g.site_id = #{params.personalSiteId})
AND g.site_id = #{siteId} AND g.site_id = #{params.personalSiteId} AND 1 = 0
AND g.name LIKE concat('%', #{name}, '%') AND g.subtitle LIKE concat('%', #{subtitle}, '%')
AND EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM gb_game_category_relations gcr WHERE gcr.game_id = g.id AND gcr.category_id IN (SELECT id FROM category_tree) )
AND NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM gb_game_category_relations gcr_unc WHERE gcr_unc.game_id = g.id)
AND (g.game_type IS NULL OR g.game_type = '') AND g.game_type = #{gameType}
AND g.remark LIKE concat('%', #{remark}, '%') AND g.status = #{status}
AND EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM gb_box_game_relations bgr WHERE bgr.game_id = g.id AND POSITION(CAST(bgr.box_id AS CHAR) IN #{boxIdsFilter}) > 0 > 0 )
AND g.update_time >= FROM_UNIXTIME(#{updateTimeStart}/1000) AND g.update_time <= DATE_ADD(FROM_UNIXTIME(#{updateTimeEnd}/1000), INTERVAL 1 DAY)

mapper.select: select g.id, g.site_id, g.name, g.subtitle, g.short_name, g.game_type, g.icon_url, g.cover_url, g.banner_url, g.screenshots, g.video_url, g.description, g.promotion_desc, g.developer, g.publisher, g.package_name, g.version, g.size, g.device_support, g.download_count, g.rating, g.features, g.tags, g.launch_time, g.is_new, g.is_hot, g.is_recommend, g.sort_order, g.status, g.del_flag, g.create_by, g.create_time, g.update_by, g.update_time, g.remark, g.download_url, g.android_url, g.ios_url, g.apk_url, g.discount_label, g.first_charge_domestic, g.first_charge_overseas, g.recharge_domestic, g.recharge_overseas, g.has_support, g.support_desc, g.has_low_deduct_coupon, g.low_deduct_coupon_url, c.id as category_id, c.name as category_name, c.icon as category_icon from gb_games g left join gb_game_category_relations gcr on g.id = gcr.game_id and gcr.is_primary = '1' left join gb_categories c on gcr.category_id = c.id and c.del_flag = '0' where g.id = #{id} and g.del_flag = '0'

select g.id, g.site_id, g.name, g.subtitle, g.short_name, g.game_type, g.icon_url, g.cover_url, g.banner_url, g.screenshots, g.video_url, g.description, g.promotion_desc, g.developer, g.publisher, g.package_name, g.version, g.size, g.device_support, g.download_count, g.rating, g.features, g.tags, g.launch_time, g.is_new, g.is_hot, g.is_recommend, g.sort_order, g.status, g.del_flag, g.create_by, g.create_time, g.update_by, g.update_time, g.remark, g.download_url, g.android_url, g.ios_url, g.apk_url, g.discount_label, g.first_charge_domestic, g.first_charge_overseas, g.recharge_domestic, g.recharge_overseas, g.has_support, g.support_desc, g.has_low_deduct_coupon, g.low_deduct_coupon_url, c.id as category_id, c.name as category_name, c.icon as category_icon from gb_games g left join gb_game_category_relations gcr on g.id = gcr.game_id and gcr.is_primary = '1' left join gb_categories c on gcr.category_id = c.id and c.del_flag = '0' where g.del_flag = '0' order by g.id asc
mapper.insert:
insert into gb_games
id, site_id, name, subtitle, short_name, game_type, icon_url, cover_url, banner_url, screenshots, video_url, description, promotion_desc, developer, publisher, package_name, version, size, device_support, download_count, rating, features, tags, launch_time, is_new, is_hot, is_recommend, sort_order, status, del_flag, create_by, create_time, remark, download_url, android_url, ios_url, apk_url, discount_label, first_charge_domestic, first_charge_overseas, recharge_domestic, recharge_overseas, has_support, support_desc, has_low_deduct_coupon, low_deduct_coupon_url, source_box_id,
#{id}, #{siteId}, #{name}, #{subtitle}, #{shortName}, #{gameType}, #{iconUrl}, #{coverUrl}, #{bannerUrl}, #{screenshots}, #{videoUrl}, #{description}, #{promotionDesc}, #{developer}, #{publisher}, #{packageName}, #{version}, #{size}, #{deviceSupport}, #{downloadCount}, #{rating}, #{features}, #{tags}, #{launchTime}, #{isNew}, #{isHot}, #{isRecommend}, #{sortOrder}, #{status}, #{delFlag}, #{createBy}, #{createTime}, #{remark}, #{downloadUrl}, #{androidUrl}, #{iosUrl}, #{apkUrl}, #{discountLabel}, #{firstChargeDomestic}, #{firstChargeOverseas}, #{rechargeDomestic}, #{rechargeOverseas}, #{hasSupport}, #{supportDesc}, #{hasLowDeductCoupon}, #{lowDeductCouponUrl}, #{sourceBoxId},

insert into gb_games ( site_id, name, subtitle, short_name, game_type, icon_url, cover_url, banner_url, screenshots, video_url, description, promotion_desc, developer, publisher, package_name, version, size, device_support, download_count, rating, features, tags, launch_time, is_new, is_hot, is_recommend, sort_order, status, del_flag, create_by, create_time, remark, download_url, android_url, ios_url, apk_url, discount_label, first_charge_domestic, first_charge_overseas, recharge_domestic, recharge_overseas, has_support, support_desc, has_low_deduct_coupon, low_deduct_coupon_url, source_box_id ) values
( #{item.siteId}, #{item.name}, #{item.subtitle}, #{item.shortName}, #{item.gameType}, #{item.iconUrl}, #{item.coverUrl}, #{item.bannerUrl}, #{item.screenshots}, #{item.videoUrl}, #{item.description}, #{item.promotionDesc}, #{item.developer}, #{item.publisher}, #{item.packageName}, #{item.version}, #{item.size}, #{item.deviceSupport}, #{item.downloadCount}, #{item.rating}, #{item.features}, #{item.tags}, #{item.launchTime}, #{item.isNew}, #{item.isHot}, #{item.isRecommend}, #{item.sortOrder}, #{item.status}, #{item.delFlag}, #{item.createBy}, #{item.createTime}, #{item.remark}, #{item.downloadUrl}, #{item.androidUrl}, #{item.iosUrl}, #{item.apkUrl}, #{item.discountLabel}, #{item.firstChargeDomestic}, #{item.firstChargeOverseas}, #{item.rechargeDomestic}, #{item.rechargeOverseas}, #{item.hasSupport}, #{item.supportDesc}, #{item.hasLowDeductCoupon}, #{item.lowDeductCouponUrl}, #{item.sourceBoxId} )

INSERT INTO gb_games ( id, site_id, name, subtitle, short_name, game_type, icon_url, cover_url, banner_url, screenshots, video_url, description, promotion_desc, developer, publisher, package_name, version, size, device_support, download_count, rating, features, tags, launch_time, is_new, is_hot, is_recommend, sort_order, status, del_flag, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time, remark, download_url, android_url, ios_url, apk_url, discount_label, first_charge_domestic, first_charge_overseas, recharge_domestic, recharge_overseas, has_support, support_desc, has_low_deduct_coupon, low_deduct_coupon_url, source_box_id ) VALUES
( #{g.id}, #{g.siteId}, #{g.name}, #{g.subtitle}, #{g.shortName}, #{g.gameType}, #{g.iconUrl}, #{g.coverUrl}, #{g.bannerUrl}, #{g.screenshots}, #{g.videoUrl}, #{g.description}, #{g.promotionDesc}, #{g.developer}, #{g.publisher}, #{g.packageName}, #{g.version}, #{g.size}, #{g.deviceSupport}, #{g.downloadCount}, #{g.rating}, #{g.features}, #{g.tags}, #{g.launchTime}, #{g.isNew}, #{g.isHot}, #{g.isRecommend}, #{g.sortOrder}, #{g.status}, #{g.delFlag}, #{g.createBy}, #{g.createTime}, #{g.updateBy}, #{g.updateTime}, #{g.remark}, #{g.downloadUrl}, #{g.androidUrl}, #{g.iosUrl}, #{g.apkUrl}, #{g.discountLabel}, #{g.firstChargeDomestic}, #{g.firstChargeOverseas}, #{g.rechargeDomestic}, #{g.rechargeOverseas}, #{g.hasSupport}, #{g.supportDesc}, #{g.hasLowDeductCoupon}, #{g.lowDeductCouponUrl}, #{g.sourceBoxId} )
ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE site_id = VALUES(site_id), name = VALUES(name), subtitle = VALUES(subtitle), short_name = VALUES(short_name), game_type = VALUES(game_type), icon_url = VALUES(icon_url), cover_url = VALUES(cover_url), banner_url = VALUES(banner_url), screenshots = VALUES(screenshots), video_url = VALUES(video_url), description = VALUES(description), promotion_desc = VALUES(promotion_desc), developer = VALUES(developer), publisher = VALUES(publisher), package_name = VALUES(package_name), version = VALUES(version), size = VALUES(size), device_support = VALUES(device_support), download_count = VALUES(download_count), rating = VALUES(rating), features = VALUES(features), tags = VALUES(tags), launch_time = VALUES(launch_time), is_new = VALUES(is_new), is_hot = VALUES(is_hot), is_recommend = VALUES(is_recommend), sort_order = VALUES(sort_order), status = VALUES(status), del_flag = VALUES(del_flag), create_by = VALUES(create_by), create_time = VALUES(create_time), update_by = VALUES(update_by), update_time = VALUES(update_time), remark = VALUES(remark), download_url = VALUES(download_url), android_url = VALUES(android_url), ios_url = VALUES(ios_url), apk_url = VALUES(apk_url), discount_label = VALUES(discount_label), first_charge_domestic = VALUES(first_charge_domestic), first_charge_overseas = VALUES(first_charge_overseas), recharge_domestic = VALUES(recharge_domestic), recharge_overseas = VALUES(recharge_overseas), has_support = VALUES(has_support), support_desc = VALUES(support_desc), has_low_deduct_coupon = VALUES(has_low_deduct_coupon), low_deduct_coupon_url = VALUES(low_deduct_coupon_url), source_box_id = VALUES(source_box_id)

INSERT INTO gb_games ( id, site_id, name, subtitle, short_name, game_type, icon_url, cover_url, banner_url, screenshots, video_url, description, promotion_desc, developer, publisher, package_name, version, size, device_support, download_count, rating, features, tags, launch_time, is_new, is_hot, is_recommend, sort_order, update_by, update_time, download_url, android_url, ios_url, apk_url, discount_label, first_charge_domestic, first_charge_overseas, recharge_domestic, recharge_overseas, has_support, support_desc, has_low_deduct_coupon, low_deduct_coupon_url, source_box_id ) VALUES
( #{g.id}, #{g.siteId}, #{g.name}, #{g.subtitle}, #{g.shortName}, #{g.gameType}, #{g.iconUrl}, #{g.coverUrl}, #{g.bannerUrl}, #{g.screenshots}, #{g.videoUrl}, #{g.description}, #{g.promotionDesc}, #{g.developer}, #{g.publisher}, #{g.packageName}, #{g.version}, #{g.size}, #{g.deviceSupport}, #{g.downloadCount}, #{g.rating}, #{g.features}, #{g.tags}, #{g.launchTime}, #{g.isNew}, #{g.isHot}, #{g.isRecommend}, #{g.sortOrder}, #{g.updateBy}, #{g.updateTime}, #{g.downloadUrl}, #{g.androidUrl}, #{g.iosUrl}, #{g.apkUrl}, #{g.discountLabel}, #{g.firstChargeDomestic}, #{g.firstChargeOverseas}, #{g.rechargeDomestic}, #{g.rechargeOverseas}, #{g.hasSupport}, #{g.supportDesc}, #{g.hasLowDeductCoupon}, #{g.lowDeductCouponUrl}, #{g.sourceBoxId} )
ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE site_id = IF(site_id IS NULL, VALUES(site_id), site_id), name = IF(name IS NULL OR name = '', VALUES(name), name), subtitle = IF(subtitle IS NULL, VALUES(subtitle), subtitle), short_name = IF(short_name IS NULL, VALUES(short_name), short_name), game_type = IF(game_type IS NULL, VALUES(game_type), game_type), icon_url = IF(icon_url IS NULL, VALUES(icon_url), icon_url), cover_url = IF(cover_url IS NULL, VALUES(cover_url), cover_url), banner_url = IF(banner_url IS NULL, VALUES(banner_url), banner_url), screenshots = IF(screenshots IS NULL, VALUES(screenshots), screenshots), video_url = IF(video_url IS NULL, VALUES(video_url), video_url), description = IF(description IS NULL, VALUES(description), description), promotion_desc = IF(promotion_desc IS NULL, VALUES(promotion_desc), promotion_desc), developer = IF(developer IS NULL, VALUES(developer), developer), publisher = IF(publisher IS NULL, VALUES(publisher), publisher), package_name = IF(package_name IS NULL, VALUES(package_name), package_name), version = IF(version IS NULL, VALUES(version), version), size = IF(size IS NULL, VALUES(size), size), device_support = IF(device_support IS NULL, VALUES(device_support), device_support), download_count = IF(download_count IS NULL, VALUES(download_count), download_count), rating = IF(rating IS NULL, VALUES(rating), rating), features = IF(features IS NULL, VALUES(features), features), tags = IF(tags IS NULL, VALUES(tags), tags), launch_time = IF(launch_time IS NULL, VALUES(launch_time), launch_time), is_new = IF(is_new IS NULL, VALUES(is_new), is_new), is_hot = IF(is_hot IS NULL, VALUES(is_hot), is_hot), is_recommend = IF(is_recommend IS NULL, VALUES(is_recommend), is_recommend), sort_order = IF(sort_order IS NULL, VALUES(sort_order), sort_order), update_by = VALUES(update_by), update_time = VALUES(update_time), download_url = IF(download_url IS NULL, VALUES(download_url), download_url), android_url = IF(android_url IS NULL, VALUES(android_url), android_url), ios_url = IF(ios_url IS NULL, VALUES(ios_url), ios_url), apk_url = IF(apk_url IS NULL, VALUES(apk_url), apk_url), discount_label = IF(discount_label IS NULL, VALUES(discount_label), discount_label), first_charge_domestic = IF(first_charge_domestic IS NULL, VALUES(first_charge_domestic), first_charge_domestic), first_charge_overseas = IF(first_charge_overseas IS NULL, VALUES(first_charge_overseas), first_charge_overseas), recharge_domestic = IF(recharge_domestic IS NULL, VALUES(recharge_domestic), recharge_domestic), recharge_overseas = IF(recharge_overseas IS NULL, VALUES(recharge_overseas), recharge_overseas), has_support = IF(has_support IS NULL, VALUES(has_support), has_support), support_desc = IF(support_desc IS NULL, VALUES(support_desc), support_desc), has_low_deduct_coupon = IF(has_low_deduct_coupon IS NULL, VALUES(has_low_deduct_coupon), has_low_deduct_coupon), low_deduct_coupon_url = IF(low_deduct_coupon_url IS NULL, VALUES(low_deduct_coupon_url), low_deduct_coupon_url), source_box_id = IF(source_box_id IS NULL, VALUES(source_box_id), source_box_id)
mapper.update: update gb_games set site_id = #{siteId}, name = #{name}, subtitle = #{subtitle}, short_name = #{shortName}, game_type = #{gameType}, icon_url = #{iconUrl}, cover_url = #{coverUrl}, banner_url = #{bannerUrl}, screenshots = #{screenshots}, video_url = #{videoUrl}, description = #{description}, promotion_desc = #{promotionDesc}, developer = #{developer}, publisher = #{publisher}, package_name = #{packageName}, version = #{version}, size = #{size}, device_support = #{deviceSupport}, download_count = #{downloadCount}, rating = #{rating}, features = #{features}, tags = #{tags}, launch_time = #{launchTime}, is_new = #{isNew}, is_hot = #{isHot}, is_recommend = #{isRecommend}, sort_order = #{sortOrder}, status = #{status}, del_flag = #{delFlag}, create_by = #{createBy}, create_time = #{createTime}, update_by = #{updateBy}, update_time = #{updateTime}, remark = #{remark}, download_url = #{downloadUrl}, android_url = #{androidUrl}, ios_url = #{iosUrl}, apk_url = #{apkUrl}, discount_label = #{discountLabel}, first_charge_domestic = #{firstChargeDomestic}, first_charge_overseas = #{firstChargeOverseas}, recharge_domestic = #{rechargeDomestic}, recharge_overseas = #{rechargeOverseas}, has_support = #{hasSupport}, support_desc = #{supportDesc}, has_low_deduct_coupon = #{hasLowDeductCoupon}, low_deduct_coupon_url = #{lowDeductCouponUrl}, source_box_id = #{sourceBoxId} where id = #{id}
update gb_games set del_flag = '2' where id = #{id}

update gb_games set del_flag = '2' where id in
#{id}
mapper.select:
SELECT g.id, g.site_id, g.name, g.subtitle, g.short_name, g.game_type, g.icon_url, g.cover_url, g.banner_url, g.screenshots, g.video_url, g.description, g.promotion_desc, g.developer, g.publisher, g.package_name, g.version, g.size, g.device_support, g.download_count, g.rating, g.features, g.tags, g.launch_time, g.is_new, g.is_hot, g.is_recommend, g.sort_order, g.status, g.del_flag, g.create_by, g.create_time, g.update_by, g.update_time, g.remark, g.download_url, g.android_url, g.ios_url, g.apk_url, g.discount_label, g.first_charge_domestic, g.first_charge_overseas, g.recharge_domestic, g.recharge_overseas, g.has_support, g.support_desc, g.has_low_deduct_coupon, g.low_deduct_coupon_url, sgr.is_visible as site_is_visible, sgr.is_featured as site_is_featured, sgr.is_new as site_is_new, sgr.sort_order as site_sort_order FROM gb_games g INNER JOIN gb_site_game_relations sgr ON g.id = sgr.game_id AND sgr.site_id = #{siteId} WHERE g.status = '1' AND g.del_flag = '0' AND sgr.is_visible = '1'
AND g.id IN ( SELECT DISTINCT game_id FROM gb_game_category_relations WHERE category_id = #{categoryId} )
ORDER BY sgr.sort_order ASC, g.create_time DESC

SELECT DISTINCT g.id, g.site_id, g.name, g.subtitle, g.short_name, g.game_type, g.icon_url, g.cover_url, g.banner_url, g.screenshots, g.video_url, g.description, g.promotion_desc, g.developer, g.publisher, g.package_name, g.version, g.size, g.download_url, g.android_url, g.ios_url, g.apk_url, g.device_support, g.discount_label, g.download_count, g.rating, g.features, g.tags, g.launch_time, g.is_new, g.is_hot, g.is_recommend, g.sort_order, g.status, g.del_flag, g.create_by, g.create_time, g.update_by, g.update_time, g.remark FROM gb_games g INNER JOIN gb_box_game_relations r ON g.id = r.game_id INNER JOIN gb_site_game_relations sgr ON g.id = sgr.game_id AND sgr.site_id = #{siteId} WHERE r.box_id = #{boxId} AND g.status = '1' AND g.del_flag = '0' AND sgr.is_visible = '1' ORDER BY sgr.sort_order ASC, g.sort_order ASC, g.create_time DESC

SELECT g.id, g.site_id, g.name, g.subtitle, g.short_name, g.game_type, g.icon_url, g.cover_url, g.description, g.status, g.del_flag, g.create_time, g.update_time FROM gb_games g WHERE g.del_flag = '0' AND g.id IN
#{id}

SELECT DISTINCT g.id, g.site_id, g.name, g.subtitle, g.short_name, g.game_type, g.icon_url, g.cover_url, g.banner_url, g.screenshots, g.video_url, g.description, g.promotion_desc, g.developer, g.publisher, g.package_name, g.version, g.size, g.download_url, g.android_url, g.ios_url, g.apk_url, g.device_support, g.discount_label, g.download_count, g.rating, g.features, g.tags, g.launch_time, g.is_new, g.is_hot, g.is_recommend, g.sort_order, g.status, g.del_flag, g.create_by, g.create_time, g.update_by, g.update_time, g.remark FROM gb_games g INNER JOIN gb_article_game_relations r ON g.id = r.game_id INNER JOIN gb_site_game_relations sgr ON g.id = sgr.game_id AND sgr.site_id = #{siteId} WHERE r.article_id = #{articleId} AND g.status = '1' AND g.del_flag = '0' AND sgr.is_visible = '1' ORDER BY sgr.sort_order ASC, g.sort_order ASC, g.create_time DESC
